title: gtq-16-photon-isnt-watching

lossless_compression.reason: No live source file found for semantic addressing.

extracted_equations.text: \chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt
\chi = \iiint(G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C)\, dx\, dy\, dt

χ = Logos Field (foundational coherence substrate). G = Grace. M = Mass/Matter. E = Energy. S = Sin/Entropy. T = Time. K = Knowledge. R = Relationship. Q = Quantum. F = Faith. C = Coherence (the Christ variable). Plain English: The Logos Field is the integral over space and time of ten coupled variables â€” the framework's claim that physical and spiritual reality are projections of the same informational substrate. Coherence Equation (derived)

C = coherence with the Logos source [0, 1]. O eff = effective openness (free will × preparation) [0, 1]. G(t) = grace, external negentropic input [0, ∞). S = entropy/sin, decay pressure (0, ∞). (1−C) = remaining room for growth. Plain English: Coherence rises with grace times openness on the room left to grow, and falls with sin acting on what coherence is already there. Born Rule — Probability of Outcome

|ψ⟩ = possibility state (the Father's role — what could happen). |φ⟩ = measurement basis (the Son's role — the structure that outcomes are read against). |·| 2 = actualization operator (the Spirit's role — possibility becoming actuality). Plain English: Standard quantum mechanics already requires three irreducible operations to make a measurement — possibility, structure, and actualization — the same triadic structure that Genesis 1 calls Father, Son, and Spirit. PEAR-LAB Per-Trial Effect Size

Δp̄ = mean shift in REG bit probability per trial, in the direction of operator intention. σ = standard deviations from chance. Plain English: Across ~2.5 million Princeton trials over 28 years, focused intention shifted random bits by about one part in ten thousand — tiny per trial, six-sigma in aggregate (above the particle-physics “discovery” threshold of 5σ). Sigma Significance Reference

5σ = particle-physics discovery threshold (probability of pure-chance origin ≈ 1 in 3.5 million). 6σ = roughly an order of magnitude stronger. Plain English: Both PEAR (~6σ) and the Global Consciousness Project (~6σ over 500+ events) sit above the threshold that physicists call “discovery” in any other context. Effective Openness Decomposition

O raw = genuine free will. P(t) = preparation function: humanity's capacity to receive and understand grace at time t. Plain English: The openness through which grace acts is free will multiplied by readiness — both must be nonzero for the coherence equation to climb. Coherence Coupling (narrow claim)
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt$
Framework Reference: Theophysics Master Equation χ = ∭(G·M·E·S·T·K·R·Q·F·C) dx dy dt
$$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt$$

The interaction architecture between the Logos field and embedded subsystems — the channel structure by which an observer's $C$-state biases the outcomes of systems they attend to. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.)
